postmark.Subject: Refinance — Marcus Webb
postmark.TextBody:
Hi Franco,

Refi for Marcus Webb. Target LTV roughly 60% on $650k property — exact loan amount to be confirmed.

Exit strategy: borrower intends to sell the property at end of term.

postmark.Subject: Re: Refinance — Marcus Webb
postmark.TextBody:
Confirmed loan amount: $320,000. Ignore the $245k on the loan application form — that was from an earlier draft. The 60% LTV target was a ceiling; borrower's final ask is $320k.

Jonathan Ferrara
Ferrara Financial
Lic. #M16002271
